explicit.h(3) Library Functions Manual explicit.h(3)

NAME

explicit.h - Check if an option was explicitly set via command-line.

SYNOPSIS

Macros


#define IS_OPTION_EXPLICIT(name, opts)

Detailed Description

Check if an option was explicitly set via command-line.

Simple macro to check if an option was explicitly provided by the user (as opposed to using a default value).

Explicit tracking fields are stored directly in options_t as ${optionName}_explicit. Only frequently-checked options have explicit tracking to avoid struct bloat.

Usage

// Check if user explicitly set an option
if (IS_OPTION_EXPLICIT("splash_screen", opts)) {


    printf("User explicitly set splash_screen\n");
}

Author

Zachary Fogg me@zfo.gg

Date

Definition in file explicit.h.

Macro Definition Documentation

#define IS_OPTION_EXPLICIT( name, opts)

Value:

((opts) && (opts)->name##_explicit)
